steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: Density is measured in ounces per cubic inch, and price is measured in dollars per ounce. Multiplying them gives dollars per cubic inch because ounces cancel.

steps.title: Multiply density by price
steps.content:
Use the density $0.565$ and the price $8.00$:
$$0.565(8.00)=4.52$$
The answer is 4.52.
